info.description: A large fixture built from Go structs first. It exercises OpenAPI-bound operations, all public runtime supplement selectors, structural workflows, triggers, results, components, and extension preservation across JSON, YAML, and HCL.
info.summary: End-to-end security incident enrichment, containment, notification, and evidence packaging.
info.title: Incident Response Automation

operations.description: Fetch the incident record and current triage state.
Load customer account context used for notification decisions.
Run ssh primary runtime task for incident response.
Run ssh fallback runtime task for incident response.
Run cmd primary runtime task for incident response.
Run cmd fallback runtime task for incident response.
Run fnct primary runtime task for incident response.
Run fnct fallback runtime task for incident response.
Run fileio primary runtime task for incident response.
Run fileio fallback runtime task for incident response.
Run sql primary runtime task for incident response.

x-uws-runtime.command: SELECT id, severity FROM incidents WHERE id = :incident_id

operations.description: Run sql fallback runtime task for incident response.

x-uws-runtime.command: SELECT id, severity FROM incidents WHERE id = :incident_id

workflows.description: Coordinate enrichment, runtime checks, branching, containment, and notification.

steps.description: Choose a local fast path before invoking the top-level switch workflow.
Loop over suspect indicators and write local evidence before remote upload.

Invoke workflow wf_switch.
Invoke workflow wf_notify_operators.
